did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that summarizes and analyzes existing studies using AI/ML/DL (such as CNNs, ANNs, SVMs) for skin cancer detection. It does not conduct original experiments or use AI to obtain new primary results itself; rather, it evaluates and compares previously published work.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
